arts.ttl: Hoffenheim vs. Werder Bremen preview: Hosts desperate to end winless run
arts.sum: Hoffenheim will attempt to end their four-game winless run in all competitions when they play host to Werder Bremen on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Preview: Hoffenheim vs. Werder Bremen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between Hoffenheim and Werder Bremen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
